overall.description: A cinematic third-person game sequence showing a character in a long dark coat walking through a desolate coastal landscape at sunset. The character traverses rocky terrain, passes a large bonfire, and approaches a wooden pier structure by the water, with atmospheric haze and golden lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal path between cliffs and ocean

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky coastal path toward the distant castle silhouette

entered.detail: steep rocky cliff face towering on the left side of the path
silhouetted castle structure visible against the bright sunset sky
calm sea visible to the right of the path
tufts of dry brown grass scattered on the sandy ground

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow rocky path with a tall cliff face on the left and open ocean on the right. The sun sets in the distance, backlighting a gothic castle structure visible ahead. Sparse dry vegetation dots the sandy ground between the rocks.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach area with large ceremonial bonfire

events.description: large pyramid-shaped bonfire becomes visible in the distance ahead
approaching the bonfire, the fire's orange glow begins illuminating the surroundings

agents.ego_description: approaching and then passing the large burning bonfire structure on the beach

entered.detail: tall pyramid of burning logs with intense orange flames reaching upward

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the beach as a large bonfire pyramid comes into view ahead. The fire's glow illuminates the surroundings as the character approaches the burning structure. The cliff face remains on the left while the castle shifts to the left side of the frame in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline with wooden pier ruins

events.description: passing the bonfire and transitioning to the open shoreline with pier visible
wooden pier ruins become clearly visible extending into the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky shoreline toward the wooden pier ruins by the water

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts and structure extending into the ocean water

segments.scene_description: Having passed the bonfire, the character walks along the rocky shoreline where gentle ocean waves meet the sand. A weathered wooden pier extends into the water on the left, while the cliff face now towers on the right side. The sun continues to set ahead, casting long golden shadows across the beach.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate coastline that transitions from a cliffside path toward a glowing bonfire and a weathered pier. It begins with the character walking a narrow rocky path between a towering cliff and the open ocean, with a gothic castle silhouetted against the distant setting sun. As the character advances along the beach, the scene shifts toward a large bonfire pyramid that casts a warm, flickering glow over the sandy terrain. The camera then follows the character past the flames and along the rocky shoreline where gentle waves meet the sand, while the cliff face moves to the right side of the frame. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal a weathered wooden pier extending into the water under a sky filled with long, golden sunset shadows.
